summary: Complete end-to-end testing of AI Discoverability Copilot Phase 0 architecture. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Authentication system, health endpoints, user management, and UI components all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status with DB connected
User registration with valid email/password returns token + user
Registration with duplicate email properly returns 400 error
Registration with short password (<6 chars) returns 422 validation error
Login with valid credentials returns token + user info
Login with wrong password returns 401 error
Protected route /api/auth/me works with valid JWT token
Protected route properly rejects requests without token (403)
Login page renders with email/password inputs and submit button
Register page accessible via 'Create one' link with all form fields
Login flow works - credentials submission redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows health status indicator (System Operational)
Sidebar navigation contains all required items (Dashboard, Page Audits, AI Citation Tests, Monitoring, Change Log)
Logout functionality works and returns to login page
success_percentage: backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), frontend: 100% (6/6 tests passed)
